svg.text: KinD CLUSTER: flux-kind · Pod CIDR: 10.244.0.0/16 (VXLAN) · Service CIDR: 10.96.0.0/12
Hubble relay observes all VXLAN flows
flux-system · cert-manager · openebs · istio-system · kyverno · falco · tetragon · kubescape
Flux controllers · cert-manager webhook · OpenEBS LocalPV · istiod control plane
Kyverno admission controllers · Falco + Falcosidekick · Kubescape operator (NSA + MITRE)
localhost:8080 → KinD containerPort:8888 → nginx (hostNetwork) :8888 → Contour Envoy DaemonSet :80 → HTTPProxy → Service
localhost:32111 → KinD containerPort:9111 → nginx stream{} :9111 → iperf3 Service :32111 (direct TCP, no circuit-breaker)
Istio Envoy sidecars (demo + observability) → OTLP gRPC :4317 → OTel Collector → Tempo (stores) → Grafana (queries :3200)
routingMode: tunnel · tunnelProtocol: vxlan · bpf.masquerade: false (Docker bridge does its own NAT)
ipam.mode: kubernetes (honours KinD podSubnet 10.244.0.0/16) · socketLB.hostNamespaceOnly: true (Envoy sidecar port safe)
